name: Insulation Tester — Metal Body, Hand-Driven
tagline: Pressure die-cast metal body, hand-driven generator insulation tester. Robust and field-proven.
description: The CIE/444 is a pressure die-cast metal body, hand-driven generator type insulation tester — the industry standard for field insulation testing. Built and calibrated in-house at our Howrah works, each instrument carries the registered CIE® mark. Available in six rated test voltages from 100 V to 5000 V, with insulation measurement up to 50,000 MΩ. Optional dual voltage and dual insulation range, built-in continuity range, or any custom range available to order.

specs.label: Rated Test Voltages
specs.value: 100 V / 250 V / 500 V / 1000 V / 2500 V / 5000 V (specify on order)

applications: Preventive maintenance in utilities and industry

name: Insulation Tester — Wooden Body, Hand-Driven
tagline: Seasoned wooden body, hand-driven generator insulation tester up to 10 kV.
description: The CIE/666 features a seasoned wooden body with a hand-driven generator, delivering test voltages from 100 V to 10 kV with insulation measurement extending to 100,000 MΩ. The wooden enclosure provides natural insulation and thermal stability, making it particularly suited to high-voltage field testing. Optional dual voltage, dual insulation range, and built-in continuity range available.

name: Multirange Insulation Tester — Metal Body (Hand-Driven)
tagline: Selectable multi-voltage, metal body, hand-driven insulation tester with built-in continuity range.
description: The CIE/444/MR provides selectable multi-voltage testing in a pressure die-cast metal body with a hand-driven generator. Available in series MR-1 through MR-8, each covering a different combination of test voltages, insulation ranges, and continuity ranges. A single instrument replaces multiple fixed-voltage testers — ideal for utilities and commissioning teams testing a variety of equipment.
applications: Multi-voltage insulation testing on a single instrument
Cable testing at varying voltage levels

name: Multirange Insulation Tester — Wooden Body (Hand-Driven)
tagline: Selectable multi-voltage, wooden body, hand-driven insulation tester with built-in continuity range.
description: The CIE/666/MR provides multi-voltage high-voltage insulation testing in a seasoned wooden body with hand-driven generator. Available in series MR-1 to MR-8. Wooden body ensures inherent insulation integrity at higher test voltages.

name: Motorised Insulation Tester
tagline: Motor-driven generator insulation tester for sustained high-voltage testing up to 10 kV.
description: The CIE/777 is a motorised generator type insulation tester providing stable, sustained test voltages from 500 V to 10 kV. Motor drive ensures a consistent test voltage independent of operator technique. Supplied with one pair of HV testing leads. Optional timer available.
applications: Sustained insulation testing on large equipment
Testing labs requiring stable HV output

name: Motor-cum-Hand Driven Insulation Tester
tagline: Dual-mode motor and hand-driven insulation tester — operates where mains power is unavailable.
description: The CIE/777 HM combines motor-driven and hand-driven operation in a single instrument. Test voltages 500 V to 10 kV. Motor drive for sustained site testing; hand drive as backup where mains supply is unavailable. Supplied with one pair of HV testing leads. Optional timer available.
applications: Field testing where mains supply is uncertain
Indian Railways track and traction equipment testing

name: Multirange Motorised Insulation Tester
tagline: Dual-scale, multi-voltage motorised insulation tester. Series MR-A to MR-E.
description: The CIE/777/MR is a motorised multi-voltage insulation tester with dual-scale (inner/outer) display. Available in series MR-A through MR-E, each covering a different combination of test voltages and insulation ranges. Motor-driven generator ensures consistent voltage output.
applications: Commissioning of transformer and cable networks

name: Multirange Motor-cum-Hand Driven Insulation Tester
tagline: Multi-voltage motor-cum-hand driven insulation tester with dual scale. Series MR-A to MR-E.
description: Combines the flexibility of multi-voltage selection (MR-A to MR-E series) with dual-mode motor and hand-driven operation. Dual-scale display. Ideal for field teams working on sites with intermittent power supply.
applications: Remote field testing with backup hand drive

name: Insulation Tester — Bakelite Body
tagline: Compact moulded bakelite body, hand-driven insulation tester. Economical everyday instrument.
description: The CIE/555 is a compact, economical hand-driven insulation tester in a moulded bakelite body. Test voltages 100 V to 1000 V. Suitable for routine insulation checking in workshops, panels, and general industry.

name: Analog Earth Tester — Metal Body
tagline: 3-terminal and 4-terminal analog earth resistance and soil resistivity tester. Supplied as a complete kit.
description: The CIE/222M is a hand-driven metal body analog earth tester for 3-terminal earth resistance measurement and 4-terminal soil resistivity measurement. Available in single, dual, triple, four, and five-range options. Supplied complete with earth spikes, wire spools, hammer, and carrying bag.

specs.label: Range Options
specs.value: Single / Dual / Triple / Four / Five range

specs.label: Accessories
specs.value: Earth spikes, wire spools, hammer, carrying bag (supplied)

applications: Soil resistivity survey for earthing design

name: Digital Insulation Tester — 500 V / 1000 V
tagline: Rechargeable microcontroller-based digital insulation tester at 500 V and 1000 V.
description: The DIT-5005 is a microcontroller-based digital insulation tester with rechargeable battery. Provides accurate digital readout of insulation resistance at 500 V and 1000 V test voltages. Compact and portable for field use.

name: Digital Insulation Tester — up to 2500 V / 50 GΩ
tagline: Five selectable test voltages to 2500 V. Measures insulation up to 50 GΩ. DAR & PI functions.
description: The DIT-2500 provides five selectable test voltages (100 V, 250 V, 500 V, 1000 V, 2500 V) with insulation measurement up to 50 GΩ. Dielectric Absorption Ratio (DAR) and Polarisation Index (PI) functions for comprehensive insulation assessment. LCD display with auto-ranging.

name: Digital Insulation Tester — up to 5000 V / 200 GΩ
tagline: High-voltage digital insulation tester to 5000 V with measurement to 200 GΩ.
description: The DIT-5000 provides selectable test voltages of 500 V, 1000 V, 2500 V, and 5000 V with insulation measurement up to 200 GΩ. Suitable for testing large HV transformers, cables, and rotating machines.
applications: HV cable testing up to 5000 V

name: Digital Earth Resistance Tester
tagline: 4-terminal digital earth resistance tester. Rechargeable. Complete kit supplied.
description: The DET-2000 is a 4-terminal digital earth resistance tester with rechargeable battery. Available in dual and triple range. Supplied as a complete testing kit including earth spikes, wire spools, and hammer.
applications: Commission and maintenance of earthing systems

name: Digital Micro-Ohm / Contact Resistance Meter
tagline: Bench-type digital micro-ohm meter for contact resistance measurement from 0–1999 µΩ to 19.99 kΩ.
description: The MR-253A is a bench-type digital micro-ohm / contact resistance meter providing measurement from 0–1999 µΩ to 19.99 kΩ across multiple ranges. Mains powered (230 V, 50 Hz, single phase). Supplied with two pairs of test leads.
applications: Busbar and cable joint resistance measurement

name: True-RMS Clamp Meter — 1000 A AC
tagline: Auto-ranging True-RMS clamp meter, 0–1000 A AC.
description: The DCM 2250 TR is an auto-ranging True-RMS clamp meter measuring AC current from 0 to 1000 A. Suitable for measuring load currents on electrical panels, motors, and distribution feeders.

name: True-RMS Clamp Meter — 1000 A AC/DC with Frequency, Temperature & Capacitance
tagline: Advanced True-RMS clamp meter, 1000 A AC/DC, frequency, temperature, and capacitance.
description: The DCM 5410 TR is a comprehensive True-RMS clamp meter measuring 1000 A AC and DC, plus frequency, temperature, and capacitance. A versatile all-in-one field instrument for electrical commissioning and maintenance.

name: Digital Multimeter — 3½-digit
tagline: 3½-digit DMM — 1000 V DC, 750 V AC, 20 A, resistance, capacitance, continuity, diode, hFE.
description: The DM 235 is a 3½-digit digital multimeter measuring DC voltage to 1000 V, AC voltage to 750 V, current to 20 A (AC/DC), resistance, capacitance, continuity, diode test, and transistor hFE. Supplied with protective holster.

name: True-RMS Digital Multimeter — 3½-digit
tagline: True-RMS 3½-digit DMM with backlight, auto power-off, and transistor/diode test.
description: The DM 321T is a True-RMS 3½-digit digital multimeter with full DCV, ACV, DCA, ACA, resistance, capacitance, transistor, and diode test functions. Backlit display and auto power-off. Ideal for accurate measurement of non-sinusoidal AC waveforms.

specs.label: Functions
specs.value: DCV, ACV, DCA, ACA, resistance, capacitance, transistor, diode

applications: Accurate AC measurement on non-sinusoidal loads

name: A.C. High-Voltage Test Set
tagline: 0–3 kV or 0–5 kV AC high-voltage test set at 25 mA and 50 mA.
description: The CIE/5050A is an AC high-voltage test set providing continuously variable output from 0 to 3 kV or 0 to 5 kV at 25 mA and 50 mA respectively. Used for HV withstand and proof testing of cables, switchgear, and equipment in the field or laboratory.
applications: HV withstand testing of cables and switchgear

name: Phase Sequence Indicator — Disc Rotating Type
tagline: Disc-rotating phase sequence indicator, bakelite body, 100–500 V AC.
description: The PSI-1 is a disc-rotating phase sequence indicator in a bakelite body. Visually indicates phase sequence of a 3-phase AC supply from 100 V to 500 V. Supplied with R/Y/B leads and carrying case.

specs.label: Accessories
specs.value: R/Y/B test leads and carrying case (supplied)

name: Phase Sequence Indicator — ABS Moulded
tagline: ABS moulded 96×96 mm phase sequence indicator, 100–500 V. Supplied with case and leads.
description: The PSI-2 is a phase sequence indicator in a compact ABS moulded enclosure (96×96 mm). Operating voltage 100–500 V AC. Supplied with carrying case and test leads.

name: Transformer Oil BDV Tester — 50 kV
tagline: Transformer oil dielectric strength (BDV) tester up to 50 kV. Manual and motorised variants.
description: The CIE/7050 tests the dielectric breakdown voltage (BDV) of transformer oil at up to 50 kV. Mains powered (230 V, 50 Hz, single phase). Available in manual and motorised variants. Options include 2-unit housing, double capacity, digital meter, and magnetic stirrer.

specs.label: Options
specs.value: 2-unit housing, double capacity, digital meter, magnetic stirrer

applications: Transformer oil quality testing before energisation
Power utility and substation maintenance labs

name: Transformer Oil BDV Tester — 100 kV
tagline: Transformer oil dielectric strength (BDV) tester up to 100 kV.
description: The CIE/7100 tests transformer oil BDV at up to 100 kV — suitable for high-voltage transformer maintenance programmes. Mains powered (230 V, 50 Hz). Manual and motorised variants with optional digital meter and magnetic stirrer.

name: Transformer Oil BDV Tester — 120 kV
tagline: High-capacity transformer oil BDV tester up to 120 kV.
description: The CIE/7120 is the highest-rated instrument in the CIE/7000 series, testing transformer oil BDV up to 120 kV. Manual and motorised variants. Options include digital meter, magnetic stirrer, and double capacity oil vessel.

specs.label: Options
specs.value: Digital meter, magnetic stirrer, double capacity, 2-unit housing

name: Relay Test Set — Single Phase, 400 VA
tagline: Single-phase relay test set, max 400 VA. Continuously variable AC current and voltage.
description: The RTS-5 is a single-phase relay test set providing continuously variable AC current and voltage sources up to 400 VA. Used for testing and commissioning single-phase protection relays in substations and panels.

specs.label: Output
specs.value: Continuously variable AC current and AC voltage

applications: Overcurrent and earth fault relay commissioning

name: Relay Test Set — Single Phase, 1000 VA
tagline: Single-phase relay test set, max 1000 VA. Variable AC current, AC and DC voltage.
description: The RTS-5A is an enhanced single-phase relay test set at 1000 VA providing variable AC current and both AC and DC voltage outputs. Suitable for testing a wider range of relay types including DC-operated relays.

specs.label: Output
specs.value: Variable AC current, AC voltage, DC voltage

name: Three-Phase Relay Test Set
tagline: Three-phase relay test set, 250 VA burden. Variable 3-phase AC current, AC/DC voltage, 0–360° phase angle.
description: The RTS-33 is CIE's flagship protection testing instrument — a three-phase relay test set providing variable three-phase AC current, AC and DC voltage sources, and 0–360° continuously variable phase angle. 250 VA burden. Used for commissioning and testing distance, differential, and directional protection relays. A preferred instrument at India's major power utilities and EPC contractors.

specs.label: Voltage Output
specs.value: Variable AC voltage and DC voltage
